summary: Senior Cloud, Platform, DevOps, and SRE Engineer with 12.5+ years of experience building scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure across AWS and GCP. Expertise in Kubernetes, GKE, Terraform, CI/CD, GitOps, observability, cloud security, and reliability engineering, with a strong track record of improving platform resilience, deployment speed, and operational efficiency. Experienced in building developer platforms and AI/ML infrastructure, including GPU-enabled Kubernetes environments, enterprise AI services, and production-grade model deployment workflows. Proven strengths in automation, incident response, root cause analysis, compliance, cost optimization, and cross-functional collaboration.
